steps.description: Press the F1 key to open the Command Palette in Visual Studio Code within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension interface.
Type text into the VS Code Command Palette: 'Microsoft 365 Agents:Zip App Package'.
Press the 'Enter' key to select the command '>Microsoft 365 Agents: Zip App Package' from the command palette in Visual Studio Code.

Click on the "manifest.json file path" text box in the "Select Teams manifest_json File" dialog window at coordinates (394, 76) in Visual Studio Code to focus the input field for editing or selection.
Type text: 'local' into the "Select an environment" dropdown field in the Visual Studio Code interface, located at the top of the screen.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm the selection of the "local" environment from the "Select an environment" dropdown in the Visual Studio Code interface.
@assertion 'App package successfully built at' is exist
